questions_to_answer: What specific data source will be used for ingestion?
What format is the data in (JSON, CSV, etc.)?
What specific aggregation methods or metrics are required?
Are there any specific report formatting requirements?
What is the expected structure of the report?
What is the frequency and time for the daily data ingestion?
Who should the report be sent to (only the admin email or others)?
Is there any specific error handling or logging requirement?
